query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS securities (
  symbol VARCHAR(16) PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  sector VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  industry VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS securities (
  symbol VARCHAR(16) PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  sector VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  industry VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL
)
